meaning: n.转义字符,转换字符 计算机上的Esc按键 /ESC/Page,EPSON公司开发的页描述语言
examples: Press the Esc key when done editing.
Press the Esc key to exit the editor.
After saving, press ESC to close the document.
The ESC has conducted a survey of public attitudes to fire safety, interviewing 4, 098 adults.
The Ariane 5-ECA (ESC-A) is due to be relieved by the Ariane 5-ECA (ESC-B) in 2006.
